summary: Ticket C - Upload Requirement Drawer testing complete. All 10 features tested and verified working correctly. The UploadRequirementDrawer component is fully functional for RTW, DBS, Identity, and PoA requirements.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error due to AttributeError: NOT_STARTED in DocumentStatus enum
minor.note: Does not affect Ticket C functionality

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticket C - Upload Requirement Drawer is complete and working. The drawer is accessible via Manage/View Files button on all 4 upload requirement cards (RTW, DBS, Identity, PoA). The drawer shows Active Files, Request History, and Historical Files sections with proper collapsible behavior. PoA drawer shows 2-document requirement banner. Per-file 3-dot action menu works correctly with View, Download, Supersede/Replace, Move Category, Mark Uploaded in Error, and View File History options.

manage_button_on_rtw.details: Manage button appears on Right to Work card and opens drawer

manage_button_on_dbs.details: Manage button appears on DBS card and opens drawer

manage_button_on_identity.details: Manage button appears on Identity card and opens drawer

manage_button_on_poa.details: Manage button appears on Proof of Address card and opens drawer

drawer_header_title_and_counters.details: Drawer shows correct title (e.g., 'Right to Work') with counters: X active, X verified, X pending

drawer_upload_and_request_buttons.details: Upload and Request buttons present in drawer header with data-testid attributes (drawer-upload-btn, drawer-request-btn)

active_files_section.details: Active Files section shows file list with names, dates, and status badges (Verified, Awaiting Review, Extraction pending)

request_history_section_collapsible.details: Request History section is collapsible and shows request count with status badges

historical_files_section_collapsible.details: Historical Files section is collapsible and shows historical file count

per_file_action_menu.details: 3-dot menu (MoreVertical icon) works for active files with options: View, Download, Supersede/Replace, Move Category, Mark Uploaded in Error, View File History

drawer_close_button.details: Drawer closes when X button is clicked or Escape key is pressed

poa_2_document_banner.details: PoA drawer shows '2 more documents required' banner with text '2 documents required for Proof of Address'
